'''Gados Floatboats''' were amphibious [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used to patrol the [[Water/Legends|waterways]] of [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]], but could use [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsors]] to travel on land. They were 10 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long by 2 meters wide and could attain speeds of up to 50[[Kilometer/Legends|km]]/[[Time/Legends|h]]. Certain variants could also manage an altitude range of up to 500m. In their civilian role of transport, they could hold up to 15 passengers or 50 tons of cargo. They were often militarized for police roles, though, and then fielded a single forward [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannon.

Floatboats were a popular form of transportation on Abregado-rae and could be seen in a vibrant array of [[Color/Legends|colors]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface.

{{Veh-stub}}
